mapper.insert: /* PageViewLogMapper.insertPageViewLog */ INSERT INTO TB_PAGE_VIEW_LOG ( GUEST_ID, MEMBER_ID, PAGE_TYPE, PAGE_URL, BEF_PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_ID, CATEGORY_CD, STAY_SECONDS, SCROLL_DEPTH, SCROLL_MAX, IS_BOUNCE, DEVICE_TYPE, CLIENT_IP, CRE_TM ) VALUES ( #{guestId}, #{memberId}, #{pageType}, #{pageUrl}, #{befProductId}, #{productId}, #{categoryCd}, #{staySeconds}, #{scrollDepth}, #{scrollMax}, #{isBounce}, #{deviceType}, #{clientIp}, NOW() )
mapper.select: /* PageViewLogMapper.selectPageViewLogById */ SELECT ID, GUEST_ID, MEMBER_ID, PAGE_TYPE, PAGE_URL, BEF_PRODUCT_ID AS befProductId, PRODUCT_ID, CATEGORY_CD, STAY_SECONDS, SCROLL_DEPTH, SCROLL_MAX, IS_BOUNCE, DEVICE_TYPE, CLIENT_IP, CRE_TM FROM TB_PAGE_VIEW_LOG WHERE ID = #{id}
